overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a waterfront dock and promenade area during golden hour. The character walks along a wooden pier, surveys the harbor and industrial skyline, then ascends to a paved promenade featuring a prominent modern skyscraper and fountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock extending over harbor water

events.description: character stops at the end of the dock to look around at the water and industrial skyline
character turns around and begins walking back along the dock toward the shore

agents.ego_description: walking to the end of the wooden dock, pausing to survey the harbor and industrial skyline, then turning to walk back toward the shore

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway
calm water surrounding the dock with gentle ripples
low industrial buildings and smokestacks visible across the harbor
large red steel truss bridge spanning the water in the distance
small motorboats tied to the side of the dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow wooden dock extending over calm harbor water, surrounded by industrial buildings and a distant red bridge. Reaching the end, the character stops to survey the water and skyline before turning to walk back, with no other pedestrians present on the dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden ramp connecting dock to upper promenade

events.description: ascending from wooden dock level to paved promenade via wooden ramp and stairs

agents.ego_description: walking up the wooden ramp and stairs from the dock level to the upper waterfront promenade

entered.detail: tall concrete wall separating the dock from the upper level
metal handrails along the wooden ramp
prominent modern white skyscraper with vertical lines becoming visible

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wooden ramp with metal railings from the dock to the upper promenade level. The tall white skyscraper becomes visible in the distance, while the harbor water and boats pass out of view behind the concrete retaining wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved waterfront promenade with fountain and benches

events.description: entering the main promenade area featuring a circular fountain and park benches
passing pedestrians while walking along the promenade pathway

agents.ego_description: walking along the paved promenade past a circular fountain, benches, and scattered pedestrians, with the tall skyscraper dominating the left side of the view

notable_agents.action: person sitting on park bench near the fountain
pedestrian walking in the opposite direction along the promenade

entered.detail: round water fountain with multiple tiers in the plaza area
wooden benches for seating along the promenade
ornate black lampposts lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wide paved promenade featuring a circular fountain and benches. The tall white skyscraper looms increasingly large on the left as the character passes other pedestrians sitting and walking along the waterfront path, with the red bridge still visible in the distance to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded industrial dock toward a bustling, modern urban promenade. It begins with the character walking along a narrow wooden pier over calm harbor water, pausing to survey the distant red bridge and industrial skyline before turning back. As the character ascends a wooden ramp with metal railings, the harbor and boats disappear behind a concrete retaining wall, and a tall white skyscraper emerges in the distance. The scene then opens onto a wide paved promenade where the character passes a circular fountain and benches. Finally, the camera moves past other pedestrians as the skyscraper looms increasingly large on the left, while the red bridge remains visible in the far distance to the right.
